Package com.nib.commons.storage

Interface IDataArea

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractNDecimal, AbstractNElementary, AbstractNField, AbstractNFloatingPoint, AbstractNNumeric, CEEDAYS.CeedaysLinkage, CEEDAYS.CeedaysWorking, CEEDAYS.LkDate, CEEDAYS.LkFc, CEEDAYS.LkFc.ConditionTokenValue, CEEDAYS.LkFc.ConditionTokenValue.Case1ConditionId, CEEDAYS.LkFc.ConditionTokenValue.Case2ConditionId, CEEDAYS.LkFormat, Cvda, Dfheiblk, ExecParm, FreeFormatNumericField, GetMainStorageId, MessageDescriptor, MqLong, NBinary, NChar, NCharBin, NCharInspected, NDouble, NFloat, NGroup, NInt16, NInt32, NInt64, NInteger, NPacked, NPointer, NUInt16, NUInt32, NumericWithOptLeadingSignField, NVarcharField, NZoned, SpecialRegister, Sqlca, StructMqtm, TcpSocketParm, TcpSocketParm.ClientId, TcpSocketParm.SockAddrInParm
public interface IDataArea
Interface representing a data area in memory.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    allocate(Memory s)
    Allocates the data area in the specified memory.

  • Method Details

    • setName

      void setName(String name)
      Sets the name of the data area.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to set

    • getName

      String getName()
      Gets the name of the data area.
      Returns:
      the name of the data area

    • length

      int length()
      Gets the length of the data area.
      Returns:
      the length of the data area

    • requiresAllocation

      boolean requiresAllocation()
      Checks if the data area requires allocation.
      Returns:
      true if allocation is required, false otherwise

    • allocate

      void allocate(Memory s)
      Allocates the data area in the specified memory.
      Parameters:
      s - the memory to allocate the data area in

    • dumpStructure

      void dumpStructure(String name, String indent)
      Dumps the structure of the data area.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the data area
      indent - the indentation to use for the structure

    • getAddress

      NAddress getAddress()
      Gets the address of the data area.
      Returns:
      the address of the data area

    • setAddress

      void setAddress(NAddress a)
      Sets the address of the data area.
      Parameters:
      a - the address to set

    • isRedefines

      boolean isRedefines()
      Checks if the data area redefines another field.
      Returns:
      true if the data area redefines another field, false otherwise

    • getBaseField

      IDataArea getBaseField()
      Gets the base field of the data area.
      Returns:
      the base field of the data area
